data.title: Infosys and Cursor partner to accelerate software engineering for global enterprises, launch Center of Excellence.
data.description: Infosys, a global leader in next-generation digital services, has inaugurated the Cursor Center of Excellence in BENGALURU, India, on January 27, 2026. This center will specialize in the greenfield and brownfield engineering of complex enterprise systems, focusing on providing speed, consistency, and scale. Infosys, listed on NSE as INFY, BSE as INFY, and NYSE as INFY, aims to enhance its capabilities in development and maintenance of enterprise systems with this strategic initiative.

data.title: Fitz-Gerald CIO predicts Apple to release 'very impressive' product this spring, akin to iPhone launch. Eagerly anticipates major announcement at developers' conference. Bullish on Apple stock, praises AI potential and strong financial metrics.
data.description: Keith Fitz-Gerald, the Chief Investment Officer (CIO) of the Fitz-Gerald Group, expressed confidence in Apple's (NASDAQ: AAPL) potential in artificial intelligence (AI) and teased a "very impressive" upcoming release from the tech giant this spring. During an interview with host Stuart Varney on Fox Business, Fitz-Gerald highlighted Apple's strong market presence, high margins, and cash flow. He anticipated a significant product launch in the spring that could be as groundbreaking as the iPhone's revolutionary form factor change, likening the event to the lead-up to the iPhone launch. The CIO hinted that the announcement might occur at the developers' conference and indicated his intention to invest further in Apple stock, countering the common belief that Apple lags behind in AI development. Fitz-Gerald also praised Apple's remarkable margins and cash flows in the conversation. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Oversight acknowledged as a pioneer in Finance Risk Intelligence, setting new standard for financial risk management.
data.description: A recent study by Everest Group has introduced Finance Risk Intelligence as a modern norm for proactive financial risk management throughout businesses. The research showcases how this approach can enhance overall financial security and efficiency. On January 27, 2026, Oversight, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven expense tracking and financial audit solutions, shared insights on the significance of Finance Risk Intelligence in ensuring continuous vigilance and control in financial operations. This signifies a crucial shift towards more advanced and comprehensive risk management strategies.

data.title: Arizona lawmakers push bill to exempt cryptocurrency from property taxes, aiming for constitutional amendment on Nov ballot.
data.description: A proposed legislation aims to present a constitutional amendment for approval on the November ballot in efforts to create a more accommodating environment for cryptocurrencies in the state.

data.title: Cornerstone Communications, LTD introduces trust-first storytelling framework in 2026. Emphasizes transparency and authenticity. Washington, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: A recent development highlights the transformation of brand trust through transparency, corrective measures, and a focus on human-centered storytelling. On January 27, 2026, Cornerstone Communications, LTD introduced a novel communication model aimed at enhancing trust in brands. This new framework emphasizes the importance of openness and accountability in rebuilding trust among consumers. By prioritizing authentic narratives and meaningful actions, companies can forge stronger connections with their audience. The initiative underscores the shifting dynamics in the realm of brand trust and highlights the significance of engaging with stakeholders in a transparent and empathetic manner.

data.title: Jiuzi Holdings gets $90 million from Morgan International at $3/share to enhance blockchain and web3 efforts.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on January 27, 2026, Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: JZXN) revealed a strategic partnership through a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Morgan International Finance Ltd. Under the MOU, Morgan plans to collaborate with Jiuzi Holdings.

data.title: Florida Atlantic University invests $20M in D-Wave's Quantum Computer, Advantage2, to boost research at their campus.
data.description: In a joint statement made by D-Wave Quantum Inc. and Florida Atlantic University (FAU), it was announced today that FAU will be acquiring an Advantage2TM annealing quantum computer from D-Wave. The installation of the quantum computer will take place at FAU's Boca Raton campus. This agreement signifies a significant investment of $20 million by FAU. D-Wave Quantum Inc., listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol QBTS, is known as the sole provider of dual-platform quantum computing solutions, offering both annealing and gate-model systems, along with software and services. The initiative aims to expedite and strengthen FAU's research and development efforts in the field of quantum computing.

data.title: D-Wave Quantum Inc. to establish new HQ and U.S. R&D facility in Boca Raton. (NYSE: QBTS) Founded in 2022.
data.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) has chosen Boca Raton, Florida as the site for its new corporate headquarters and primary U.S. research and development (R&D) center. The company, which is the sole provider of both annealing and gate-model quantum computing systems, software, and services, made this announcement today. Following its initial public offering on the New York Stock Exchange in 2022, D-Wave has established itself as a U.S.-based organization. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to expanding its operations in the U.S.

data.title: D-Wave reports advancements in quantum computing technologies, offering annealing and gate-model systems. Key milestones revealed at Qubits 2026 conference. (count: 124)
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) has revealed significant advancements in their products and technology. The leading dual-platform quantum computing company, offering both annealing and gate-model systems along with software and services, shared updates showcasing the growing customer adoption and technological progress. During their Qubits 2026 annual user conference, D-Wave introduced enhanced hybrid solver capabilities. This new feature allows customers to integrate machine learning into their quantum computing processes.

data.title: Anduril, Davidson, and D-Wave collaborate to develop quantum applications for US air and missile defense. Key players involved: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS), Davidson Technologies Inc., Anduril Industries Inc.
data.description: In a collaboration announcement today, D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS), headquartered in Palo Alto, California, Davidson Technologies, Inc., based in Huntsville, Alabama, and Anduril Industries Inc., located in Costa Mesa, California, have partnered up. D-Wave is a leading quantum computing company offering annealing and gate-model systems, software, and services. Davidson Technologies specializes in providing technology solutions to U.S. Department of Defense and aerospace clients. Anduril is a defense technology firm concentrated on advanced autonomous systems. This strategic partnership aims to leverage D-Wave's quantum computing expertise to enhance technological solutions for defense and aerospace sectors.

data.title: CMS proposed modest 0.09% payment increase for Medicare Advantage in 2027, causing notable health insurers like UnitedHealth and Humana to decline.
data.description: CMS has proposed modest payment growth of 0.09% for Medicare Advantage plans in 2027, amounting to over $700 million in additional payments. This update has put pressure on notable U.S. health insurers such as Alignment Healthcare, Centene Corporation, CVS Health Corporation, Elevance Health, Humana Inc., Molina Healthcare Inc., and UnitedHealth Group Inc. The proposed changes are part of the annual process to update payment rates and technical assumptions for Medicare Advantage plans. The Wall Street Journal estimated a rate increase of 4% to 6% but the actual proposal fell below expectations. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
